steps.name: Step 1: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all targeted functions from the fuzzing suite using the extract_target_functions.py script

steps.name: Step 2: Build Artifacts
steps.description: Generate Forge build artifacts with build-info

steps.name: Step 3: Extract Context with sol-expand
steps.description: Run sol-expand tool to extract context from build artifacts

steps.name: Step 4: Identifying Touched Functions
steps.description: Identify all contracts that are touched by the contracts targeted in the system that we care about

steps.name: Step 5: Identifying Meaningful Values
steps.description: Identify values that are useful for clamping target function handlers with
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-1.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-1 agent to identify values useful for clamping.

steps.name: Step 6: Creating Clamped Handlers
steps.description: Implement clamped function handlers to achieve full coverage on the system setup
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-2.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-2 agent to implement clamped handlers

steps.name: Step 7: Creating Shortcut Handlers
steps.description: Implement shortcut handlers that allow the fuzzer to reach coverage faster.
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-3.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-3 agent to implement shortcut functions

steps.name: Step 10: Initial Check of Coverage
steps.description: Determine if coverage needs to be improved

decision.NOTE: Branch to improve coverage by identifying source of blockages
No missing coverage file found, skip to workflow completion

steps.name: Step 11: Improving Coverage
steps.description: Analyze coverage gaps and improve clamped handlers to achieve better coverage
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-5.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-5 agent to improve coverage of the system

steps.name: Step 14: Coverage Improvement Decision Check
steps.description: Check if coverage needs to be improved

decision.NOTE: Loop back to Step 11 to continue with coverage improvement
No missing coverage file found, proceed to workflow completion

steps.name: Step 15: Workflow Complete
steps.description: Workflow has completed successfully - full coverage achieved or no coverage gaps detected
